records.question: Who are the players that died in Kalamazoo, MI?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN player_college ON player.player_id = player_college.player_id
JOIN college ON player_college.college_id = college.college_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND player.death_state = 'MI'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player.player_id
FROM player
WHERE player.death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND player.death_state = 'MI'

records.question: Which players named Tom, who throw right-handed, were born in Erie, PA with a birth day at least 19, debuted since 1982-07-15, are at least 71 inches tall, and played their final game on or after 1990-07-04?

SELECT player.player_id FROM player
WHERE player.final_game >= '1990-07-04' AND player.birth_day >= 19 AND player.name_first = 'Tom' AND player.throws = 'R' AND player.height >= 71 AND player.birth_city = 'Erie' AND player.debut >= '1982-07-15' AND player.birth_state = 'PA'

SELECT player.player_id
FROM player
WHERE player.name_first = 'Tom'
  AND player.throws = 'R'
  AND player.birth_city = 'Erie'
  AND player.birth_state = 'PA'
  AND player.birth_day >= 19
  AND player.debut > '1982-07-15'
  AND player.height >= 71
  AND player.final_game >= '1990-07-04'

records.question: Which players have a height of at least 73 and also have recorded all_star appearances, recorded appearances, received manager_awards, and received player_awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
JOIN player_award ON player.player_id = player_award.player_id
WHERE player.height >= 73
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
WHERE p.height >= 73
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM all_star WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appearances WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM manager_award WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM player_award WHERE player_id = p.player_id)

records.question: Which players were born on the 6th and died on the 2nd, have at most 0 at-bats but at least 0 caught stealing in postseason, and played for teams at Exposition Park with no more than 222 stolen bases and attendance no more than 243826?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN batting_postseason ON player.player_id = batting_postseason.player_id
JOIN team ON batting_postseason.team_id = team.team_id
WHERE player.birth_day = 6 AND player.death_day = 2 AND batting_postseason.ab <= 0 AND team.park = 'Exposition Park' AND team.sb <= 222 AND team.attendance <= 243826 AND batting_postseason.cs >= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
JOIN batting_postseason bp ON p.player_id = bp.player_id
JOIN team t ON bp.team_id = t.team_id AND bp.year = t.year
JOIN home_game hg ON t.team_id = hg.team_id AND t.year = hg.year
JOIN park pk ON hg.park_id = pk.park_id
WHERE p.birth_day = 6
  AND p.death_day = 2
  AND bp.ab <= 0
  AND bp.cs >= 0
  AND pk.park_name LIKE '%Exposition Park%'
  AND t.sb <= 222
  AND hg.attendance <= 243826

records.question: Which players named Lawrence Robert Bowa, born on day 6, weighing exactly 155, that have recorded all_star, appearances, manager_award, and player_college entries, have appearances with at least 0 games as catcher, at least 0 games played overall, and at most 0 games as second baseman?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
JOIN player_college ON player.player_id = player_college.player_id
WHERE appearances.g_p >= 0 AND player.weight = 155 AND player.birth_day = 6 AND player.name_given = 'Lawrence Robert' AND appearances.g_2b <= 0 AND player.name_last = 'Bowa' AND appearances.g_c >= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
WHERE p.name_first = 'Lawrence'
  AND p.name_last = 'Robert'
  AND p.birth_day = 6
  AND p.weight = 155
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM all_star WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appearances WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM manager_award WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM player_college WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM appearances a
    WHERE a.player_id = p.player_id
      AND a.g_c >= 0
      AND a.g_all >= 0
      AND a.g_2b <= 0
  )

records.question: Which players have recorded all_star, appearances, manager_award, and batting_postseason records, with appearances showing exactly 138 games started, zero games as right fielder, at most 140 games as shortstop, and at most 142 games overall; batting_postseason showing at least 3 strikeouts and at most 1 stolen base?

SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
JOIN batting_postseason ON player.player_id = batting_postseason.player_id
WHERE appearances.g_rf = 0 AND appearances.g_ss <= 140 AND appearances.gs = 138 AND batting_postseason.so >= 3 AND batting_postseason.sb <= 1 AND appearances.g_all <= 142
records.pred_sql:

FROM player p
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM all_star WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM appearances 
              WHERE player_id = p.player_id 
              AND gs = 138 
              AND g_rf = 0 
              AND g_ss <= 140 
              AND g_all <= 142)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM manager_award WHERE player_id = p.player_id)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM batting_postseason 
              WHERE player_id = p.player_id 
              AND so >= 3 
              AND sb <= 1)

records.question: Which players who bat L and are at least 77 inches tall were born in month 8 or earlier, have at least 149 outfield games, have at least 0 pitching and pinch running appearances, and earned at least 448 maximum award vote points?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN player_award_vote ON player.player_id = player_award_vote.player_id
WHERE appearances.g_of >= 149 AND player.birth_month <= 8 AND appearances.g_p >= 0 AND player_award_vote.points_max >= 448 AND player.bats = 'L' AND player.height >= 77 AND appearances.g_pr >= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
WHERE p.bats = 'L'
  AND p.height >= 77
  AND p.birth_month <= 8
  AND p.player_id IN (
    SELECT a.player_id
    FROM appearances a
    WHERE (a.g_lf + a.g_cf + a.g_rf + COALESCE(a.g_of, 0)) >= 149
  )
  AND p.player_id IN (
    SELECT b.player_id
    FROM batting b
    WHERE b.g >= 0
  )
  AND p.player_id IN (
    SELECT a.player_id
    FROM appearances a
    WHERE COALESCE(a.g_ph, 0) + COALESCE(a.g_pr, 0) >= 0
  )
  AND p.player_id IN (
    SELECT pav.player_id
    FROM player_award_vote pav
    WHERE pav.points_max >= 448
  )

records.question: Which players named Goldsmith born in MD, weighing exactly 146, who died in Washington, have at most 19 batting games, exactly 2 catching games, and at least 0 pitching games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Washington' AND player.name_last = 'Goldsmith' AND player.weight = 146 AND appearances.g_batting <= 19 AND player.birth_state = 'MD' AND appearances.g_c = 2 AND appearances.g_p >= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
LEFT JOIN appearances a ON p.player_id = a.player_id
LEFT JOIN batting b ON p.player_id = b.player_id
LEFT JOIN fielding f ON p.player_id = f.player_id
WHERE p.name_last = 'Goldsmith'
  AND p.birth_state = 'MD'
  AND p.weight = 146
  AND p.death_state = 'Washington'
  AND (b.g_batting IS NULL OR b.g_batting <= 19)
  AND (a.g_c = 2 OR (a.g_c IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM appearances a2 WHERE a2.player_id = p.player_id AND a2.g_c IS NOT NULL
  )))
  AND (f.g IS NULL OR (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pos = 'P' THEN g ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM fielding WHERE player_id = p.player_id) >= 0)
GROUP BY p.player_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.g_c = 2 THEN 1 END) > 0 OR NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM appearances WHERE player_id = p.player_id AND g_c IS NOT NULL AND g_c != 2
)
